### Friends of Probability

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Lisa Goldberg"
    url    = "http://jenniferchayes.com/"
    image  = "/images/lisa-goldberg.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor of the Practice of Economics"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Dan-Virgil Voiculescu"
    url    = "https://math.berkeley.edu/~dvv/"
    image  = "/images/dvv_1.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor"
>}}

:::
